title: Status LED Small Baynot Cap Light Bulb (Warm White) | 5.5watt (40watt) 407 Lumens | Candle | 5.5SLCSBCP1PKB8
features: Status LED SBC Candle Pearl Bulb
5.5 Watt (Equivalent to 40 Watt) 470 Lumen SBC (Small Bayonet Cap)
Saves over 85% Energy compared to Heavy Duty Lamps
6 hrs per day use will last 11 years
Bulb Cost per year = 1.12 pound based on 0.14 pound price per KW/h

description: Product Description LED lamps have a crisp bright white light with up to 85 percent energy saving compared to heavy duty lamps. Box Contains 1 x Candle
